name: designer-kit
description: Design-first plugin for non-coding product and design workflows focused on briefs, critique, and pre-code screen specifications.

interface.shortDescription: Design briefs, critique, and pre-code screen specifications for design-only workflows.
interface.longDescription: Provides design-first skills for non-coding designers and planners: choose the right design workflow with the guide skill, then create design briefs, critique existing UI directions, or turn aligned intent into pre-code screen specifications without collapsing into implementation guidance.
defaultPrompt: Use $designer-kit-guide to choose whether this needs a design brief, UI critique, or a screen spec.
Turn this vague product idea into a design brief with goals, hierarchy, tone, and non-goals.
Critique this screen idea like a product designer and prioritize the biggest UX issues.
Convert this aligned brief into a pre-code screen spec with sections, content intent, and interaction expectations.
